emails.subject: Follow-up Meeting on Wharton
emails.body: Follow-up Meeting on Wharton Good morning everyone: Vince would like to schedule a follow-up meeting on Wharton as soon as we can agree on a time. How does Monday the 18th look for you? Vince is free from 9:30 AM 11:30 AM and from 1:00 PM 4:00 PM. Please let me know if you are available during any of these times. Thanks! Shirley Crenshaw 3-5290

emails.subject: Follow-up Meeting on Wharton
emails.body: It seems like several of you will be on vacation next week, so lets see if we can do it this week. Vince is available on Thursday from 2:00 3:00 PM or Friday, from 1:30 2:30 PM. Do either one of these two times work? Let me know. Thanks! Shirley Forwarded by Shirley Crenshaw/HOU/ECT on 12/12/2000 10:56 AM Shirley Crenshaw 12/12/2000 09:20 AM

emails.subject: Re: Follow-up Meeting on Wharton
emails.body: Re: Follow-up Meeting on Wharton Shirley, Unless my flights change, I can call in from my cell phone--what number shall I dial? Thanks! --Christie.

emails.subject: Re: Follow-up Meeting on Wharton
emails.body: Re: Follow-up Meeting on Wharton Shirley, Unless my flights change, I can call in from my cell phone--what number shall I dial? Thanks! --Christie.

emails.subject: Re: Follow-up Meeting on Wharton
emails.body: HI Christie: The telephone number in EB1938 is: 713/853-3135. Have a safe trip. Shirley Christie Patrick 12/12/2000 10:36 PM
